overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through the streets of Los Santos. The clip begins on a commercial sidewalk, features a near-miss collision with a truck at an intersection, passes a metro entrance, and continues through the upscale Rockford Hills neighborhood with palm-lined streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with parking garage entrance

events.description: white taco truck with yellow signage drives past on the left side of the street
blue sports car accelerates past the taco truck on the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past commercial buildings and palm trees

notable_agents.action: taco truck driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk
blue sports car overtaking the truck at high speed

entered.detail: multi-story concrete parking structure with parking signage
tall palm trees lining the street creating shadows on the sidewalk
grey electrical utility box on the sidewalk
modern glass office building with white facade across the street
ornate black metal street lamp posts along the curb
black metal bollards separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: Walking along a commercial sidewalk next to a parking garage, with palm trees lining the street. A taco truck and blue sports car pass by on the left as the camera moves forward through the sunlit urban environment.

events.description: character transitions from walking to running toward the intersection
character stops abruptly to avoid collision with a large Meteorite candy truck
character reaches the opposite sidewalk after crossing the intersection

agents.ego_description: running across the intersection, stopping to avoid a truck, then continuing to the other side

notable_agents.action: large red and yellow Meteorite candy truck driving through the crosswalk
black SUV waiting at the traffic light

entered.detail: glass and concrete metro station entrance visible across the intersection
traffic signal poles with multiple lights at the intersection corners

segments.scene_description: The character runs across a busy intersection, narrowly avoiding a collision with a large Meteorite candy truck. The scene shifts from the enclosed sidewalk to the open crosswalk with traffic lights and multiple vehicles passing through.

scene_state.functional_zone: metro station entrance with pedestrian plaza

events.description: approaching the modern metro entrance with glass canopy structure
passing from commercial area into the upscale Rockford Hills residential district

agents.ego_description: walking past the metro entrance and observing pedestrians nearby

person in yellow shirt standing near the metro map kiosk

entered.detail: modern curved glass and steel canopy covering the metro stairs
transit information kiosk with map display near the entrance
large stone monument sign with Rockford Hills lettering

segments.scene_description: Walking past a modern metro entrance with a glass canopy, where pedestrians are entering and exiting. The Rockford Hills sign becomes visible in the distance as the character continues along the landscaped sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: upscale residential sidewalk with park and church views

events.description: passing the Rockford Hills sign and entering the landscaped park area

agents.ego_description: walking along the palm-lined sidewalk past park benches and gardens

entered.detail: white Spanish colonial style church with twin towers and arched windows
black metal park benches along the sidewalk under palm trees
landscaped flower beds with pink and red flowers
tall modern residential tower with balconies

segments.scene_description: Strolling through the upscale Rockford Hills area, passing park benches and landscaped gardens. The white church building and modern apartments form the backdrop along the quiet, palm-lined pedestrian path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling commercial district into the quiet, upscale atmosphere of Rockford Hills. It begins by moving along a sunlit sidewalk past a parking garage and palm trees, as a taco truck and a blue sports car glide by on the adjacent street. As the camera reaches a busy intersection, the scene opens into a wide crosswalk where the character narrowly avoids a collision with a large Meteorite candy truck. The movement then continues past a modern glass metro canopy filled with pedestrians, shifting the focus toward a distant neighborhood sign. Finally, the environment transitions into a serene residential landscape, passing manicured gardens and park benches toward a white church and modern apartments.
